content: Self-Refine's single-LLM iterative feedback loop can be grounded by multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to solve its blind spot of failing to catch errors consistent with the model's own inherent biases. This hybrid framework would retain Self-Refine's advantage of needing no extra training or supervision while improving refinement quality by surfacing inconsistencies across different solving perspectives that a single self-feedback pass would miss.
